description: Geliştirmede kullanılmamış (veya explicitly regression-anchored) cümleler. RQ1 totoloji olmasın diye. Beklentiler ikiye split: expected_pipeline_behavior + expected_lowering_behavior.

expected_pipeline_behavior.rule_marker_provenance: test-side heuristic (classifier does not expose which marker matched; Faz 6 calibration)

fixtures.held_out_or_regression_reason: Held-out sette sıfır Türkçe; RQ2 (iki dilli lowering) totoloji-olmayan kanıt. TR alias chain (bağımlılık → bagiml → Coupling) + TR rule marker (malı).

expected_pipeline_behavior.rule_marker_provenance: test-side heuristic (classifier does not expose which marker matched; Faz 6 calibration)

fixtures.held_out_or_regression_reason: Semantik false-positive: 'couplings' fiziksel boru, yazılım metric değil. Matcher Coupling hint üretir (YANLIŞ).
fixtures.note: The deterministic matcher can confuse lexical coupling with software coupling. The matcher is not the contribution; the binding protocol is.
fixtures.sentence: The couplings in the pipe assembly must not be reused.

expected_pipeline_behavior.rule_marker_provenance: test-side heuristic (classifier does not expose which marker matched; Faz 6 calibration)

fixtures.held_out_or_regression_reason: Negasyon vakası: 'must not' rule marker + coupling axis, ama anlam NEGATİF (rule devre dışı). Coarse classifier negasyon yakalayamaz.
fixtures.note: Coarse classifier negation yakalayamaz; RuleCandidate yine üretilir. Negation-aware lowering Faz 6.
fixtures.sentence: Coupling rule must not be enforced during tests.

expected_pipeline_behavior.rule_marker_provenance: test-side heuristic (classifier does not expose which marker matched; Faz 6 calibration)

fixtures.held_out_or_regression_reason: MultipleCandidates: canonical hem coupling hem cohesion → ambiguity Multiple. A6 negatif yol #2 (AxisNotInCandidates) ile ortak.
fixtures.sentence: Coupling and cohesion must not diverge.

expected_pipeline_behavior.rule_marker_provenance: test-side heuristic (classifier does not expose which marker matched; Faz 6 calibration)

fixtures.held_out_or_regression_reason: REGRESSION-ANCHORED (held_out DEĞİL): PR36 bare-witness testinin pipeline tekrarı. canonical WitnessCountMust → bare witness var, witnessdepth yok → NoAxisCandidate.
fixtures.note: PR36 davranışı: bare witness WitnessDepth axis üretmez (witnessdepth ayrımı).
fixtures.sentence: Witness count must not create metric evidence.

methodology_note: Cümle seçimi 'canonical-kesme tuzağı' (derive_rule_name ilk 3 kelime → lowering canonical üzerinden axis tarar) ve 'marker-kaçırma tuzağı' (must vs must not) göz önünde tutularak yapıldı. Her cümle paper3_evidence.rs::preflight testinde gerçek pipeline koşusuyla pinlenmiştir.

summary.design_discipline: Her cümle 'canonical-kesme' ve 'marker-kaçırma' tuzaklarından kaçacak şekilde seçildi. paper3_evidence.rs::preflight testinde pinlenmiştir.

title: Paper 3 — Held-out / Adversarial Fixture Set
